data.body: a41f committed (bottom of stack, Change-Id I846fd5f). Plan-reviews: a41f/b55f/319a/eba7 PASS+signed; e205/9d81 BLOCK->remediated. e205: expanded to full stale-bash footprint (leaf.py whole docstring + _seam.py + __init__.py module docstrings, which contradict _seam.append_event's own 'Tier D retired the bash seam' docstring; test.yml test_bash_suites gone; external-integration.yml bash-engine comment) with a single completeness grep; deliberately left _store lineage/interop refs (event_append.py, lock.py bash-migration §6) as legit historical. 9d81: chose label-in-place NO git-mv (bash-migration.md has 8-10 inbound src refs; moving = large blast radius, ~zero benefit) -> Historical-evidence section + taxonomy + 3 living-doc links; in-session grep proof. NOTE: f088 archive-relocation wording now moot (nothing moves); will adjust f088 to keep general relative-link check when implementing it.
